name: Legion Commander
description: If they want war, then we shall give it to them! Tresdin, the Legion Commander When Legion commander or an allied Hero within 1200 range casts an ability, they gain bonus armor for 6s; allies gain 50% of the value. This bonus stacks independently.

abilities.name: Outfight Them!
abilities.description: When Legion commander or an allied Hero within 1200 range casts an ability, they gain bonus armor for 6s; allies gain 50% of the value. This bonus stacks independently. Base Armor Bonus: 1. Additional Armor Bonus per Level: 0.1. Duration: 6. Radius: 1200. Ally Bonus Armor: 50%.

abilities.name: Overwhelming Odds
abilities.description: Grants Legion Commander bonus attack speed upon cast. Radius: 600 (700). Base Damage: 35/65/95/125. Damage Bonus per Hero: 35/65/95/125 (70/100/130/160). Damage Bonus per Creep: 14/16/18/20. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Slow Duration: 0.3. Cooldown: 90/105/120/135.

abilities.name: Press the Attack
abilities.description: Applies a Strong Dispel on the unit-targeted ally while granting bonus movement speed and bonus health regeneration for a short time. Cast Range: 700. Health Regen Bonus: 24/36/48/60 (64/76/88/100). Move Speed Bonus: 10%/14%/18%/22% (25%/29%/33%/37%). Duration: 5. Radius: (500). Additional Movement Speed Bonus: (15%). Cooldown: 16/15/14/13. Mana Cost: 90.

abilities.name: Moment of Courage
abilities.description: After a set number of incoming attacks, Tresdin counter-attacks with bonus lifesteal immediately. Required Incoming Attacks: 7/6/5/4 (6/5/4/3). Lifesteal: 55%/65%/75%/85% (155%/165%/175%/185%). Attack Speed Bonus: 1000. Duration: 1. Instant Attack Factor: 1. Creep Lifesteal Factor: 0.6. Mana Cost: 0.3.

abilities.name: Duel
abilities.description: Tresdin and the target enemy hero are forced to attack each other for a short duration. She can cast her abilities while Dueling, but not use items. Grants permanent bonus attack damage to the victor during the Duel duration. Cast Range: 200. Victor Attack Damage Bonus: 10/20/30. Duration: 4/4.5/5 (4.75/5.25/5.75). Cooldown: 60/55/50. Mana Cost: 75.
